team.date_founded: Founded in the haze-shrouded settlements of Titan, where football is played half-glimpsed through orange murk.
team.number_of_fans: Around 21 million, secretive and loyal, hard to read as their home moon.
team.badge: An orange droplet falling through swirling haze, half-hidden.
team.home_kit: Murky orange and brown with a swirling haze pattern that obscures the number.
team.history: Titan Methane are the system's enigma — a hardy, patient side raised in thick atmosphere who specialise in the unsettling, counterattacking ambush. Opponents say playing them is like grasping at smoke: nothing seems to happen, and then suddenly the ball is in the net.
team.club_culture: Patient, secretive, and quietly tough. The Haze reveal nothing and punish everything.
team.political_leaning: Frontier-independent, with the guarded reserve of an isolated moon.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation for ambushing the unwary
legends: Vapor Sturm — the counterattacking striker who scored from nowhere, again and again
achievements: Most goals scored in the final fifteen minutes

stadium.date_built: Built within a sealed dome against Titan's thick, cold atmosphere.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the hydrocarbon-harvest combines that fuel the moon.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, with deep space to launch the ambush.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the dense, frigid air.
stadium.bio: The Orange Haze is a strange, half-lit dome where the murky atmosphere seems to seep onto the pitch. Visiting players speak of losing track of the ball — and of the Haze's counterattacks materialising out of the gloom.

training_facility.date_built: A professional campus built into the hydrocarbon harvest works.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the moon's harvest combines.
training_facility.bio: The Hydrocarbon Athletic Campus drills endurance in thick-air conditions, building lungs that outlast opponents and the patience to wait for the killing counter.

manager.appearance: Inscrutable and still, gives nothing away from the technical area.
manager.bio: Haze Kowalski is a master of the patient ambush — his Titan sides sit deep in the murk, absorb everything, and strike on the counter when opponents least expect it. He says little and reveals less.
manager.playing_history: A counterattacking forward who specialised in the late, decisive goal.
manager.playing_philosophy: Give them nothing to see, then strike from the haze. Patience is a weapon; surprise is the kill.
manager.culture: An enigma who treats information as currency.
achievements: Built a side feared for its late ambushes

managing_staff.appearance: Quiet and rugged, drills the squad in the thickest dome air.
managing_staff.bio: Haze Mbuyi builds the atmospheric endurance that lets the Haze outlast opponents and ambush them late, when tired legs can no longer track the counter.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Win the last fifteen minutes. The haze belongs to whoever can still breathe.
managing_staff.culture: The engine of the late ambush.
achievements: Built the conditioning behind the late-goal record

players.appearance: Calm and obscured, a keeper who reads the murk.
players.bio: Haze Yamamoto is the balanced keeper who launches the ambush, distributing fast and accurate from a deep block.
players.culture: The first whisper of the counter.

players.appearance: Tireless and quiet, the workhorse on the flank.
players.bio: Murk Anderson is the relentless full-back who grafts in the deep block and breaks late when the ambush springs.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the deep defender.
players.bio: Fog Larsson is the team-first defender who absorbs pressure without panic, the patience before the strike.

players.appearance: Combative and firm, the bite in the block.
players.bio: Smog Walker is the aggressive defender who breaks up attacks to feed the counter, relishing the murky battle.

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, times the ambush.
players.bio: Miasma Santos is the composed defender who reads the moment to spring, the patient timer of the counter.

players.appearance: Inventive and quick, the brain of the ambush.
players.bio: Drift Cruz is the creative spark who threads the killing pass the instant the counter erupts from the haze.

players.appearance: Willing and quiet, covers the murk.
players.bio: Murky Rivers is the selfless runner who powers the transition from deep block to sudden break.

players.appearance: Balanced and calm, the controlled link.
players.bio: Dusk Ito is the composed midfielder who keeps the counter purposeful rather than frantic.
achievements: Highest pass completion on the break

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the point of the ambush.
players.bio: Halo Nkosi is the selfish finisher who appears from the gloom to convert the counter, cold and clinical in space.

players.appearance: Direct and combative, sparks the break.
players.bio: Shroud Martinez is the aggressive forward who triggers the ambush, hounding tired defenders into the mistakes the Haze feed on.
achievements: Most high turnovers won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, a second finisher.
players.bio: Fume Chandra is the selfish forward who doubles the threat on the break, hungry to outscore his partner.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Gloom Beck is the cautious veteran second keeper, a settling presence behind the first choice.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Veil Torres is the team-first deputy who slots into the deep block without weakening it.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Dim Park is the promising young defender absorbing the club's patient ways, calm and durable.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Fade Tanaka is the creative deputy who can unlock a stubborn block, a youngster brimming with quiet ideas.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Pall Kim is the eager young finisher pushing for a place, a selfish forward learning the art of the late ambush.
